mapper.select: SELECT tptw.*, tptw.work_start || ' ~ ' || tptw.work_end AS work_time, tei.equipment_nm, tpci.part_comp_nm, CASE WHEN taia.signature IS NOT NULL THEN 'Y' WHEN tais.signature IS NOT NULL OR taiw.signature IS NOT NULL OR tair.signature IS NOT NULL THEN 'I' -- WHEN tais.signature IS NOT NULL THEN 'I' -- WHEN taiw.signature IS NOT NULL OR tair.signature IS NOT NULL THEN 'W' ELSE 'C' END AS approval_status FROM esg.tb_permit_to_work tptw LEFT JOIN esg.tb_equipment_info tei ON tei.equipment_id = tptw.equipment_id LEFT JOIN esg.tb_partner_comp_info tpci ON tpci.part_comp_id = tptw.part_comp_id LEFT JOIN esg.tb_approval_info taiw /* 작업자 대표 */ ON taiw.target_type = 'PTW' AND taiw.target_id = tptw.write_year || tptw.doc_no AND taiw.type = 'worker' LEFT JOIN esg.tb_approval_info taia /* 승인권자 (작업허가 책임자) */ ON taia.target_type = 'PTW' AND taia.target_id = tptw.write_year || tptw.doc_no AND taia.type = 'workApprover' LEFT JOIN esg.tb_approval_info tair /* 수급업체 대표 */ ON tair.target_type = 'PTW' AND tair.target_id = tptw.write_year || tptw.doc_no AND tair.type = 'subcontractorRep' LEFT JOIN esg.tb_approval_info tais /* 현장감독자 */ ON tais.target_type = 'PTW' AND tais.target_id = tptw.write_year || tptw.doc_no AND tais.type = 'siteSupervisor' WHERE 1 = 1 AND tptw.comp_id = #{compId} AND tptw.write_year = #{writeYear} ORDER BY tptw.use_yn DESC, tptw.doc_no DESC

SELECT tptw.*, tptw.work_start || ' ~ ' || tptw.work_end AS work_time, tei.equipment_nm, tpci.part_comp_nm, tpc.inspection_nm FROM esg.tb_permit_to_work tptw LEFT JOIN esg.tb_equipment_info tei ON tei.equipment_id = tptw.equipment_id LEFT JOIN esg.tb_partner_comp_info tpci ON tpci.part_comp_id = tptw.part_comp_id LEFT JOIN esg.tb_dataset_safety_work_checklist tpc on tpc.inspection_id = tptw.inspection_id WHERE 1 = 1 AND tptw.comp_id = #{compId} AND tptw.write_year = #{writeYear} AND tptw.doc_type = #{docType} AND tptw.doc_no = #{docNo} ORDER BY tptw.use_yn DESC, tptw.doc_no DESC

WITH has_data AS ( SELECT EXISTS ( SELECT 1 FROM esg.tb_permit_to_work_type tptwt WHERE tptwt.comp_id = #{compId} AND tptwt.write_year = #{writeYear} AND tptwt.doc_type = #{docType} AND tptwt.doc_no = #{docNo} ) AS exists_flag ), data_if_exists AS ( SELECT tptwt.* FROM esg.tb_permit_to_work_type tptwt WHERE tptwt.comp_id = #{compId} AND tptwt.write_year = #{writeYear} AND tptwt.doc_type = #{docType} AND tptwt.doc_no = #{docNo} ORDER BY tptwt.ord_seq ), data_if_not_exists AS ( SELECT NULL as write_year, NULL as doc_no, NULL as doc_type, #{compId} as comp_id, tdcd.minor_cd as work_type_id, tdcd.minor_nm as work_type_nm, 'N' as check_yn, NULL as additional_info, tdcd.ord_seq, NULL::timestamp as created_at, NULL as created_by, NULL::timestamp as updated_at, NULL as updated_by FROM esg.tb_common_d tdcd WHERE tdcd.use_yn = 'Y' ORDER BY tdcd.ord_seq ) SELECT * FROM data_if_exists WHERE (SELECT exists_flag FROM has_data) = true UNION ALL SELECT * FROM data_if_not_exists WHERE (SELECT exists_flag FROM has_data) = false;
mapper.insert:
SELECT LPAD((COALESCE(MAX(SUBSTRING(doc_no, 1, 5)::INTEGER), 0) + 1)::TEXT, 5, '0') AS docNo FROM esg.tb_permit_to_work WHERE write_year = #{writeYear} AND doc_type = #{docType}
INSERT INTO esg.tb_permit_to_work ( write_year, doc_no, doc_type, comp_id, work_dt, work_start, work_end, workplace, equipment_id, work_content, part_comp_id, overall_opinion, use_yn, created_at, created_by ) VALUES ( #{writeYear}, #{docNo}, #{docType}, #{compId}, #{workDt}, #{workStart}, #{workEnd}, #{workplace}, #{equipmentId}, #{workContent}, #{partCompId}, #{overallOpinion}, #{useYn}, now(), #{createdBy} )

SELECT LPAD((COALESCE(MAX(SUBSTRING(doc_seq, 1, 5)::INTEGER), 0) + 1)::TEXT, 5, '0') AS docSeq FROM esg.tb_permit_to_work_detail WHERE write_year = #{writeYear} AND doc_type = #{docType} AND doc_no = #{docNo}
INSERT INTO esg.tb_permit_to_work_detail ( write_year, doc_type, doc_no, doc_seq, ord_seq, inspection_id, inspection_item, acceptable_yn, non_compliant_yn, unacceptable_yn, created_at, created_by ) VALUES ( #{writeYear}, #{docType}, #{docNo}, #{docSeq}, #{ordSeq}, #{inspectionId}, #{inspectionItem}, #{acceptableYn}, #{nonCompliantYn}, #{unacceptableYn}, now(), #{createdBy} )

INSERT INTO esg.tb_permit_to_work_type ( write_year, doc_no, doc_type, comp_id, work_type_id, work_type_nm, check_yn, additional_info, ord_seq, created_at, created_by ) VALUES ( #{writeYear}, #{docNo}, #{docType}, #{compId}, #{workTypeId}, #{workTypeNm}, #{checkYn}, #{additionalInfo}, #{ordSeq}, now(), #{createdBy} )
INSERT INTO esg.tb_permit_to_work_hr ( write_year, doc_no, doc_type, hr_id, created_at, created_by ) VALUES ( #{writeYear}, #{docNo}, #{docType}, #{hrId}, now(), #{createdBy} )

INSERT INTO esg.tb_permit_to_work_eq ( write_year, doc_no, doc_type, doc_seq, ord_seq, safety_eq_item_id, created_at, created_by ) VALUES ( #{writeYear}, #{docNo}, #{docType}, #{docSeq}, #{ordSeq}, #{safetyEqItemId}, now(), #{createdBy} )
mapper.select: SELECT * FROM esg.tb_dataset_safety_work_checklist WHERE 1 = 1 AND comp_id = #{compId} ORDER BY ord_seq
mapper.insert:
WITH current_date_info AS ( SELECT TO_CHAR(CURRENT_DATE, 'YYYYMMDD') AS today, COALESCE(MAX(SUBSTRING(inspection_id, 9, 4)::INTEGER), 0) AS max_sequence FROM esg.tb_dataset_safety_work_checklist WHERE SUBSTRING(inspection_id, 1, 8) = TO_CHAR(CURRENT_DATE, 'YYYYMMDD') ) SELECT today || CASE WHEN max_sequence = 0 THEN '0001' ELSE CASE WHEN max_sequence < 9999 THEN LPAD((max_sequence + 1)::TEXT, 4, '0') ELSE '0001' -- 시퀀스가 9999에 도달하면 재시작 END END AS inspectionId FROM current_date_info;
INSERT INTO esg.tb_dataset_safety_work_checklist ( comp_id, inspection_id, inspection_nm, use_yn, ord_seq, created_at, created_by ) VALUES ( #{compId}, #{inspectionId}, #{inspectionNm}, #{useYn}, #{ordSeq}, now(), #{createdBy} )

WITH current_date_info AS ( SELECT TO_CHAR(CURRENT_DATE, 'YYYYMMDD') AS today, COALESCE(MAX(SUBSTRING(inspection_item_id, 9, 4)::INTEGER), 0) AS max_sequence FROM esg.tb_dataset_safety_work_checklist_detail WHERE SUBSTRING(inspection_item_id, 1, 8) = TO_CHAR(CURRENT_DATE, 'YYYYMMDD') ) SELECT today || CASE WHEN max_sequence = 0 THEN '0001' ELSE CASE WHEN max_sequence < 9999 THEN LPAD((max_sequence + 1)::TEXT, 4, '0') ELSE '0001' -- 시퀀스가 9999에 도달하면 재시작 END END AS inspectionItemId FROM current_date_info;
INSERT INTO esg.tb_dataset_safety_work_checklist_detail ( comp_id, inspection_id, inspection_item_id, inspection_item_nm, use_yn, ord_seq, created_at, created_by ) VALUES ( #{compId}, #{inspectionId}, #{inspectionItemId}, #{inspectionItemNm}, #{useYn}, #{ordSeq}, now(), #{createdBy} )
mapper.select: SELECT * FROM esg.tb_dataset_safety_equipment WHERE 1 = 1 AND comp_id = #{compId} ORDER BY ord_seq
mapper.insert:
WITH current_date_info AS ( SELECT TO_CHAR(CURRENT_DATE, 'YYYYMMDD') AS today, COALESCE(MAX(SUBSTRING(safety_eq_id, 9, 4)::INTEGER), 0) AS max_sequence FROM esg.tb_dataset_safety_equipment WHERE SUBSTRING(safety_eq_id, 1, 8) = TO_CHAR(CURRENT_DATE, 'YYYYMMDD') ) SELECT today || CASE WHEN max_sequence = 0 THEN '0001' ELSE CASE WHEN max_sequence < 9999 THEN LPAD((max_sequence + 1)::TEXT, 4, '0') ELSE '0001' -- 시퀀스가 9999에 도달하면 재시작 END END AS safetyEqId FROM current_date_info;
INSERT INTO esg.tb_dataset_safety_equipment ( comp_id, safety_eq_id, safety_eq_nm, use_yn, ord_seq, created_at, created_by ) VALUES ( #{compId}, #{safetyEqId}, #{safetyEqNm}, #{useYn}, #{ordSeq}, now(), #{createdBy} )

WITH current_date_info AS ( SELECT TO_CHAR(CURRENT_DATE, 'YYYYMMDD') AS today, COALESCE(MAX(SUBSTRING(safety_eq_item_id, 9, 4)::INTEGER), 0) AS max_sequence FROM esg.tb_dataset_safety_equipment_detail WHERE SUBSTRING(safety_eq_item_id, 1, 8) = TO_CHAR(CURRENT_DATE, 'YYYYMMDD') ) SELECT today || CASE WHEN max_sequence = 0 THEN '0001' ELSE CASE WHEN max_sequence < 9999 THEN LPAD((max_sequence + 1)::TEXT, 4, '0') ELSE '0001' -- 시퀀스가 9999에 도달하면 재시작 END END AS safetyEqItemId FROM current_date_info;
INSERT INTO esg.tb_dataset_safety_equipment_detail ( comp_id, safety_eq_id, safety_eq_item_id, safety_eq_item_nm, use_yn, ord_seq, created_at, created_by ) VALUES ( #{compId}, #{safetyEqId}, #{safetyEqItemId}, #{safetyEqItemNm}, #{useYn}, #{ordSeq}, now(), #{createdBy} )
